sections.paragraph:
προσκυλίω 1 aor. προσεκύλισα (Aristoph., Vesp. 202 al.; Polyaenus 2, 31, 3) roll (up to) τὶ someth. λίθον τῇ θύρᾳ a stone to the opening Mt 27:60; also ἐπὶ τὴν θ. Mk 15:46; Lk 23:53 v.l.—DELG s.v. κυλίνδω.

aor. aor. = aorist

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

someth. someth. = something

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 882
